ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the college football team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Name of the team's mascot */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team being ranked */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number for the ranking */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the team */,
  "record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "no_1_votes" INTEGER /* Number of first-place votes received by the team */,
  "pv_rank" INTEGER /* Previous week's ranking */,
  "change" INTEGER /* Change in ranking from the previous week */,
  "media_points" INTEGER /* Points received from media voters */,
  "coach_points" INTEGER /* Points received from coach voters */,
  "overall_score" TEXT /* Combined score from various metrics for a more nuanced ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number when the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game for the team (win/loss) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game for the team */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time when the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcasted the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the conference commissioner */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the conference */,
  "conference_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the conference's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach leads */,
  "tenure_start" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's tenure with the team */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Total career wins of the coach */,
  "career_losses" INTEGER /* Total career losses of the coach */,
  "coach_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's photo */,
  "national_championships" INTEGER /* Number of national championships won by the coach */,
  "awards" TEXT /* JSON object listing notable awards received by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that uses the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "stadium_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface */,
  "opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team receiving the vote */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number for the vote */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking position voted for the team */,
  "no_1_votes" INTEGER /* Number of first-place votes received by the team */,
  "voter_type" TEXT /* Type of voter (e.g., coach, media) */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter (could be a coach or media member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, analyst, coach) */,
  "favorite_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's favorite team */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_favorite_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
